execution.reason: reviewed G7 harness, conditional-separation mathematics, and phase adapter are committed and pinned; structural and T5 delegate verbatim to the pinned G6 executor and the conditional criterion was validated on synthetic systems only

review_record.interrupted_attempt_disposition: the first execution attempt (launched 2026-07-21) was killed at 00:54 IST by harness-session teardown, not by the study harness, after the structural and T5 phase barriers completed (89 of 220 unit receipts) and one T6 unit had sealed; the partial staging block was deleted per the frozen refuse-resume rule without any receipt content, artifact, or outcome being read — only receipt counts and completed-phase names were observed to make this disposition decision
review_record.no_criterion_change: no implementation, threshold, or criterion changed between the interrupted attempt and the relaunch
review_record.relaunch: execution re-armed unchanged: same manifest, freeze commit, executor, and draws; the relaunched process is fully detached from the interactive session to remove the interruption cause
